task_completion.description: Verify the customer 'Midwest Energy Cooperative' was created.

task_completion.description: Verify the project 'Annual Turbine Maintenance 2024' was created with 'Admin User' as the Project Admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Annual Turbine Maintenance 2024' in the projects list or project details screen, and ensure 'Admin User' is listed as the Project Admin.

task_completion.description: Verify the three required activities were added to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Turbine Inspection', 'Parts Replacement', and 'Safety Testing' in the activities list associated with the 'Annual Turbine Maintenance 2024' project.

task_completion.description: Verify the timesheet entries for Ethan Davis match the required daily schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the timesheet grid for Ethan Davis. Check the rows for the project/activities and the columns for Monday to Friday to ensure the hours match: Mon: 8.00 (Turbine Inspection); Tue: 6.00 (Turbine Inspection), 2.00 (Parts Replacement); Wed: 8.00 (Parts Replacement); Thu: 4.00 (Parts Replacement), 4.00 (Safety Testing); Fri: 8.00 (Safety Testing).

task_completion.description: Verify the total hours on the timesheet equal 40.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a total of 40.0 hours in the timesheet summary or total row.
Look for a status indicator showing 'Submitted' or a message indicating successful submission on the timesheet page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with an HR/timesheet management system (e.g., OrangeHRM), not terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be a genuine web application, not a text editor, mock-up, or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify no scripts or direct database manipulations were used to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of Python scripts, curl commands, or database queries in the terminal or code editors.
